AR1.justification: Correctly declined to act and produced no misrouted entry; refusal was generic about documentation value rather than grounded in the methodology's strict-bar framing (orphaned AGENTS.md cross-references, workspace-shape rationale).

AR3.justification: No cross-references were authored; nothing broke but nothing demonstrates the relative-path convention either.

AR4.justification: No file mutations occurred, so the workspace is trivially idempotent and forward-compatible on re-run.
